nasb.text: She had a sister called Mary, who was seated at the Lord’s feet, listening to His word.

esv.text: And she had a sister called Mary, who sat at the Lord’s feet and listened to his teaching.

cnv.text: 她有一個妹妹，名叫馬利亞，坐在主的腳前聽道。

ccb.text: 玛大的妹妹玛丽亚坐在耶稣脚前听道，

csbs.text: 玛妲有个妹妹，称为玛丽亚，坐在主的脚前听他的话语。
